subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Haft Sham' (Seven Candles)
subcodes.first_line: O captive of the love of God! The letter which thou didst write at the time of thy departure hath been received. It brought me joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه محبت الله مکتوبی که هنگام رفتن مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید از
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @unity in diversity, @composition and decomposition, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @unity of governments; political unity, @unity of thought and belief, @oneness; unity of religion, @universal language, @race unity; racial issues
